(2) Server side: [redacted_service_count] [redacted_service_group] healthy on [redacted_host]. API responds correctly (POST /v1/events). [redacted_queue_service] queue [redacted_queue_name] has 1 consumer, 0 pending messages. Worker processes events. [redacted_datastore] stores [redacted_event_count] events. (3) Monitoring: [redacted_metrics_service] scrapes 6 targets (alloy/loki/prometheus/rabbitmq/telemetry_api/tempo). [redacted_monitoring_ui] accessible at [redacted_monitoring_host]. OTel traces export via [redacted_trace_store]. (4) Privacy: Telemetry runtime data (.agents/pm/runtime/telemetry/) is gitignored. No credentials in source code.
